sentences.text: The coverage of large cases of fraud with VAT for several hundred million kroner now gets  The Social Democrats to propose the creation of a pan-European tax Europol, which can ensure  better coordination.
In addition, national controls need to be strengthened.
Every year, European taxpayers lose billions of kroner to fraudsters, and organisation will now take action against this.

By using complicated company constructions, the scammers take advantage of lack of cooperation and one  failing controls in European tax systems to cheat with, among other things, VAT on goods such as  electricity, CO2 quotas and food.

Among other things, this has happened in a specific case in which Danish directors are presumed to have played a central role in  a complex that draws threads to several European countries and where, according to case documents, has been committed  VAT fraud for more than half a billion kroner.

The case, which emerged on Tuesday, has in Denmark been covered by organisation and the business media organisation as  part of the pan-European project Grand Theft Europe with journalists from 35 media in all EU countries  as well as Norway and Switzerland.
According to person, who is the tax rapporteur for organisation, the hedging shows that it is  necessary to strengthen the coordination of organisation in the field.

"We are proposing an actual tax Europol, where representatives from individual countries can sit in office  at the same time where they can coordinate and exchange information as well as analyze the new fraud patterns, '  he says .
"This is cross-border crime.
That is why, in our opinion, there is also European  level need to strengthen cooperation between the tax authorities of the various countries.
Because when scammers work internationally, the tax authorities have to do the same.
«organisation The Commission estimates that European treasuries are losing EUR 50 billion a year due to  fraud.
VAT carousels have been around since the European VAT system was introduced in 1993, but it has  until now it has been impossible to get the Member States to put a lasting stop to the fraud.
In 2017, the Commission came up with a proposal for a new VAT system that changes the way VAT becomes  settled when goods cross borders.
At the same time, the proposal contains a verification process that must do  it is easier to identify the companies that do not pay their taxes and VAT.
The proposal came through the EU Parliament, but has never progressed beyond organisation, where more  Member States oppose the transfer of competences to the organisation in the field of taxation.

"For me, this is the only possible answer if we want to stop this type of fraud," says person,  there is EU Commissioner for Economic and Fiscal Policy as well as Customs and Taxation, according to EUobserver as  reaction to the revelations in Grand Theft Europe.
'I do not want to point the finger at any specific ministers or Member States, but we know that to a large extent it is  because of the rule of unanimity, ”he says.

It screams to organisation On Wednesday, organisation and organisation uncovered how a number of fraudulent companies have been allowed to operate  from false addresses and an empty building plot on Amager, where there is nothing but a ruined one  mailbox.
A case which, according to the French expert in VAT fraud person, shows that in Denmark  special control challenges.
And that makes more tax rapporteurs demand action.
“Your examples are screaming to heaven.
To me, these are clear examples of the control from organisation and in the area of ​​the Danish Business Authority not being sufficient at all, «says person.
"This shows that the control has been far too vague.
We need to have a finer mesh control network.
That  is something that we want to address politically, "says tax spokesman person (organisation).
organisation tax rapporteur, person person, agrees.
»It sails in organisation.
The auditors have also warned about this over and over again.
We have heard of companies where the owner is named  person, or where companies are registered at addresses in Andeby.
But if companies cannot be traced, they must be forcibly dissolved, "she says.
Both organisation and organisation's tax rapporteur, person, propose that organisation be concretely strengthened  with 1,000 new employees specifically for the control effort.
»We can see that the fraud that affects Denmark is in the billions, so these employees will earn their  pay home again very many times, "says person.
The Minister of Taxation person (organisation) has been presented with the cases by organisation organisation.
He points out that  there is already today a focus on screening companies with various digital tools to find out  the fraudulent companies.
“Our strategic efforts are already here, just as they must be here in the future.
And this case is also an example of why it should do so.
Cross-border economic  crime is serious and must be fought, "says person.

segj@information.dk skipper@information.dk lasa@information.dk  Facts: SERIES Grand Theft Europe  Information's investigative editorial team, together with the business media organisation and a large number of others  media from all over organisation for several months worked to uncover international VAT fraud for billions  of crowns.
The collaboration is coordinated by the independent German research organization CORRECTIV under the name  Grand Theft Europe.
A total of 63 journalists from 35 media have jointly reviewed and analyzed 315,000  pages documents that have been leaked from several investigations in Germany, Italy and Spain, among others.
The documents include searches, wiretaps, emails and accounting information.

The first articles, documentaries and podcasts from Grand organisation will be published from 7 May onwards  across Europe, and cross-border media cooperation continues to explore it  cross-border crime.
